questions.question: John says God is what?
questions.feedback: Whoever does not love does not know God, because God is love.

questions.question: John says perfect love drives out what?
questions.feedback: There is no fear in love. Perfect love drives out fear.

questions.question: John says we love because God first loved us.
questions.feedback: We love because he first loved us.

questions.question: Test the _____ to see whether they are from God, because many false prophets have gone out.
questions.feedback: Test the spirits to see whether they are from God.

questions.question: The one who is in you is _____ than the one who is in the world.
questions.feedback: The one in you is greater than the one in the world.
